title: FormatStringTime — HH:mm:ss fixed layout
description: FormatStringTime with the fixed `HH:mm:ss` layout (no tz, no milliseconds)
notes: `23:59:59` passes. Out-of-range fields (`99:99:99`) fail with `val` `HH:mm:ss`; a missing seconds component (`23:59`) and hour 24 (`24:00:00`) are also rejected.
